name: Betterment
one_liner: A digital investment advisory platform offering automated investing, retirement planning, and cash management services for retail and institutional clients.

ambiguities: Total funding figures vary across sources: Tracxn cites $335M, CB Insights and Finovate cite $435M (including a $100M credit facility alongside the $60M Series F equity), and PitchBook cites $461M; $435M used as the most-cited figure from reputable press coverage.
Headcount estimates range from ~500 (pipl.ai) to 631 (PitchBook) to 626 (Tracxn as of Mar 2026); 626 used from Tracxn as the most recent dated figure.
Founded year: company incorporated as holding entity in 2008, publicly launched and LLC established in 2009–2010; 2008 used per Wikipedia and Finovate.
Tech stack sourced from 2017 Flatiron School interview and Betterment engineering blog; may not fully reflect current stack.
The $100M credit facility (ORIX/Runway Growth Capital) closed simultaneously with the Series F equity in Sep 2021; not counted as separate equity round.
